message:
docs(model connectors): align events, subscriptions, and catalogs with spec

Make subscribe/unsubscribe request/response shapes match FCP Core (type/id + response.result), introduce EventAck and JSON-RPC meta/trace helpers, and require correlation_id on events.

Add RiskLevel enum, CapabilitiesCatalog, and archetype declarations; ensure event sequencing is per-topic for streaming and stable in other archetypes.
